message:
feat(tui): markdown AST-to-terminal rendering pipeline (br-3vwi.3.1)

- Enable `markdown` feature in ftui-extras dependency
- Add tui_markdown module wrapping ftui_extras::markdown for TUI use
  - render_body() with auto-detection (plain text vs GFM)
  - render_body_streaming() for partial/incomplete content
  - 10 unit tests covering GFM elements and edge cases
- Wire markdown rendering into Messages screen detail panel
  - Replace manual word-wrapping with MarkdownRenderer
  - Split header (plain) and body (styled) rendering
  - Preserve scroll behavior across combined content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
